% ── SUMMARY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Summary}

Data Platform Engineer with 2+ years at ADP --- architected Python ETL pipelines processing 10K+ payroll records/month across AWS Glue/Lambda/RDS, achieved 80\% classification precision and 25\% fewer false positives, and cut infrastructure costs 40\%; open to Critical Skills Employment Permit (CSEP) sponsorship.
      Independently shipped two production data platform products --- Job Tailor (jobtailor.in) and Keen. Stack: Python, AWS, Node.js, React/TypeScript.

% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{Data Platform Engineer \& Software Engineer}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected Python ETL pipeline ingesting 10K+ payroll audit cases/month across 1M+ employee records --- structured data flow from ingestion → risk scoring → audit trail generation, reducing manual audit effort by 40\%.
  \item Engineered data quality framework achieving 80\% classification precision on anomaly detection (time fraud, tax miscalculations, duplicate payments) and cutting false positives by 25\% through feature engineering and model tuning.
  \item Built AWS data infrastructure (Lambda, Glue, DynamoDB, RDS, Step Functions) and Pivotal Cloud Foundry pipelines; cut infrastructure costs 40\% and eliminated 15+ hours of manual testing weekly while maintaining 99.9\%+ availability.
  \item Designed schema and ingestion pipelines for IRS codes and state labor law datasets alongside structured payroll data; automated compliance classification and generated complete audit trails for every flagged case.
  \item Architected Node.js/Express microservices orchestrating data pipelines and LLM inference, handling 10,000+ daily API calls at \textless{}200 ms latency via connection pooling and caching strategies.
  \item Integrated AWS Bedrock and OpenAI into production data workflows; improved operational efficiency 30\% and reduced resolution time 25\% by automating root-cause analysis and surfacing insights to stakeholders.
  \item Designed React and Angular/TypeScript dashboards for analytics consumers to visualize pipeline outputs and risk patterns in real time; improved Time-to-Interactive by 1.2 seconds.
\end{itemize}

% ── PROJECTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Projects}

\entry{Job Tailor}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder}{github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://jobtailor.in/}{jobtailor.in}}{2025 -- Present}

  \item Architected and shipped ATS data pipeline end-to-end as sole engineer --- keyword extraction → gap scoring → LLM bullet rewrite → match ranking --- Next.js 14, TypeScript, PostgreSQL/Supabase, Vercel.
  \item Engineered real-time job scoring pipeline; AI ranks each opportunity by candidate fit with ranked breakdown, cutting hundreds of listings to a personalised shortlist instantly.
  \item Achieved 85\%+ ATS keyword coverage on tailored outputs across global job markets --- packaged as a live production SaaS at jobtailor.in.
\end{itemize}

\entry{Keen --- AI Due Diligence Platform}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/keen}{github.com/lohith261/keen} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://keen-sigma.vercel.app/}{keen-sigma.vercel.app}}{2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected real-time financial data pipeline for PE due diligence --- multi-source ingestion from SEC EDGAR, Salesforce, NetSuite, HubSpot, and Crunchbase; pipeline supports pause/resume without progress loss.
  \item Engineered AI analysis layer cross-referencing aggregated data to surface revenue mismatches, audit red flags, and risk discrepancies; exports as PDF, Excel, or Google Sheets. Stack: React/TypeScript + Python 3.11 (Fly.io) + Supabase + Redis.
